features.name: type parameter used as type argument in class default
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class where a type parameter is used as a type argument in a default type assignment within another class

features.name: class extending parameterized parent with type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized class passing its own type parameter to the parent's type parameter

features.name: chained type parameter through inheritance
features.description: Code should include a type parameter that flows from a subclass through a parent class's default type expression to a grandparent class's type parameter
